caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt is positioned in a small rectangular overlay window at the bottom of a screen. He is situated in a room with a dark background, and a logo for "CASEBREAKS.com" appears beneath him. The majority of the screen displays a Google Sheet with several columns of data, including city abbreviations like "ORL," "OKC," and "LA." To the right of the spreadsheet, a chat window shows messages from "glovebug27" saying "turning" and "Nightbot" stating, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/Nzde6sK9". At the top of the screen, the browser tab is titled '"Crown Royale PYT #5 TEAM GIVEAWAY" 21...'. Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks. The spreadsheet and chat window remain static throughout the sequence.
